title: calonema filiferum
intro: Calonema filiferum, also known as the 'hairy calonema', is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It is a type of herbaceous perennial native to the tropical regions of Asia. Calonema filiferum has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of alkaloids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, to benefit health by reducing fever, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system.
